name: PyTorch Geometric (PyG)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); Snap Stanford / Matthias Fey

performance.notes: GPU-accelerated message passing; sparse operations; scales to millions of nodes

agent_readiness.notes: Leading graph neural network library on PyTorch. GCN, GraphSAGE, GAT, GIN, SchNet, DimeNet, 100+ model implementations. Message passing framework. Heterogeneous graphs. Temporal graphs. Graph transformers. Benchmarks on OGB (Open Graph Benchmark). Used for molecular property prediction, knowledge graph completion, recommendation systems, drug discovery, materials science. Rich dataset collection (OGB, TUDatasets).

gotchas: API can be confusing between different data formats (Data, HeteroData, etc.)
Debugging GNN models harder than standard DNN
best_when: Molecular property prediction and drug discovery
avoid_when: Small graphs where simpler approaches suffice
summary: PyTorch Geometric (PyG) is the leading graph neural network library. 100+ GNN model implementations (GCN, GAT, GraphSAGE, graph transformers). Message passing framework. Heterogeneous and temporal graphs. OGB benchmarks. Used for molecular property prediction, drug discovery, knowledge graph completion, and recommendation systems. Installation complex but the most comprehensive GNN library.
